content.text:
The fresh-build failure is fixed in [lex/playground/prototype-app/build.zig](file:///<redacted>/lex/playground/prototype-app/build.zig#L59-L78).

The issue was that `swiftc` wrote directly to `macos/Lex.app/Contents/MacOS/Lex`, but the `Contents/MacOS` directory was never created on a clean build. I added an explicit `mkdir -p macos/Lex.app/Contents/MacOS` build step and made the Swift compile step depend on it.

Verification:
- Ran `rm -rf macos/Lex.app/Contents/MacOS && zig build`
- Build succeeded
- Confirmed the output binary exists at `macos/Lex.app/Contents/MacOS/Lex`
